summary: CRITICAL: Workflow references non-existent `tests/` directory (runs `pytest tests/ -v` but files don't exist). run_act_tests.py references missing `fixtures/commits_*.txt` files and `.actrc` file in PROJECT_FILES—both not provided. Task requires "all tests must be runnable and must pass at the end" but test files (test_bump_version.py, test_workflow.py) are absent. Core bump_version.py is sound (good error handling, clear semver logic, proper Path usage) but deliverable is non-functional. Workflow YAML structure looks correct but will fail immediately. Missing .actrc means `act` tests cannot run.
